name: graph-advocate
description: Ask any blockchain question in plain English — token balances, DeFi analytics, NFT data, prediction market odds, cross-venue prediction-market spreads (Polymarket ↔ Limitless, Polymarket ↔ Kalshi), Hyperliquid perps trader intelligence, x402 settlement analytics (132M+ payments + onchain agent-reputation lookups), and protocol stats. Covers 15,500+ subgraphs across 20+ chains.
author: paulieb14
